---
title: "Using gglm"
output: html_notebook
---

# Packages
```{r}
library(magrittr)
```

# Make a `gglm` plot
```{r}
p1 = gglm(fit) 
```

# Make another residual plot
```{r}
p2 = ggplot(fit) +
      geom_histogram(aes(x=scale(residuals(fit)),
                     y = after_stat(density)),
                     fill="red", color='black'
                     ) + 
      geom_function(fun = dnorm, 
                args=list(mean=0, sd=1), 
                linetype = "dashed",
                color="blue") +
  labs(x="Standardized Residuals")
```

# Plot them with `patchwork`
```{r fig.height=10, fig.width=12}
list(p1, p2) |> wrap_plots(design="AA\nAA\nB#")
```
